{{Infobox location
| name = Dawn Sky Palace
| introduced = Wintersteel
}}

== Overview ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|The Dawn Sky Palace is an extravagant, miniature pocket dimension contained within a [[void key]]. It functions as a luxurious residence and is smaller in scale than certain other void keys. Originally the property of the wife of [[Tiberian Arelius]], it was later acquired by Sophara and eventually came into [[Lindon]]'s possession. The space has served as a temporary refuge for [[Lindon]] and his companions, including [[Orthos]] and [[Blue]], providing them with a place to stay during their travels.}}

== Wintersteel ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|The [[Dawn Sky Palace]] is a tiny pocket world that once belonged to [[Tiberian Arelius]]�s wife.}}

== Reaper ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|The Dawn Sky Palace serves as a structure or portal that [[Lindon]] possesses the ability to open. While [[Orthos]] remained inside the palace, [[Lindon]] contemplated using its [[void key]] for entry. Although he considered returning to the location at a later time, [[Lindon]] and his companions eventually found themselves locked inside the structure.}}

<div class="wv-facts"><div class="wv-facts-head">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">5</span></div><div class="mw-collapsible mw-collapsed wv-facts-body">
<ul class="wv-fact-list">
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|[[Orthos]] stays inside the [[Dawn Sky Palace]].<ref name="cradle-10-reaper-c7">''Reaper'', chapter 7</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|[[Lindon]] considered opening the [[Dawn Sky Palace]] [[void key]].<ref name="cradle-10-reaper-c10">''Reaper'', chapter 10</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|The [[Dawn Sky Palace]] is a location [[Lindon]] considered returning to.<ref name="cradle-10-reaper-c12">''Reaper'', chapter 12</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|The [[Dawn Sky Palace]] is a portal or structure [[Lindon]] can open.<ref name="cradle-10-reaper-c16">''Reaper'', chapter 16</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|[[Lindon]] and his companions were locked inside the [[Dawn Sky Palace]].<ref name="cradle-10-reaper-c19">''Reaper'', chapter 19</ref>}}</li>
</ul>
</div></div>

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Cradle nav}}

[[Category:Locations]]
[[Category:Wintersteel]]
[[Category:Reaper]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle locations]]
[[Category:Otherworldly locations]]
